name: The Adventure of Amethyst Knight / 紫水晶骑士物语
short_description: "This is a single-player RPG based on the 'Tower of the Sorcerer' gameplay. Control the hero to collect resources on the map, defeat monsters, obtain gold coins, and continuously improve your attributes until you defeat the final Demon Dragon King！
detailed_description:
This is a super retro and super "simple" RPG, inspired by "Tower of the Sorcerer", but using a vast RPG map. Control the hero to collect items, defeat monsters to get gold coins, talk to different NPC, increase each attributes and eventually chanllege the demon dragon king! 

You can invite the princess to travel with you and benefit from her healing magic, or you can changllege yourself by sovling the complex map puzzle all by the hero alone!

In the game, use WASD or Arrow Key to move, use Space,Enter or F key to interact with the scene, The map contains 4 different areas representing for levels. And can be treated as a huge puzzle game, hope you enjoy it!

The level editor is also included, so you can modify the game whatever you like freely!
